textByHash.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHash.8b77f9cc30657c265e744b51889436ed7ccabf2a: Ahh, you came to the right man; odd things, those trees. What is it you are needing exactly?
textByHash.cb740ed5e0c185ad96deac3c5201509c0140cea6: Sounds like you need a blessed axe. No one really makes them, though, these days.
textByHash.1b27754ed8e1329a48179ccc15343e12e0da0f35: Blessed axes are too soft to cut normal wood since the axe's edge must be replaced by holy silver. I can do you a favour, though.
textByHash.1fe1cbd8499adebc2b1eeb5bffc8f25118bd30bf: If you can give me a mithril axe and a holy symbol of Saradomin I can let you have my axe. I'll make myself a new one when no one is pestering me for Slayer tasks.
textByHash.50c9bf615f788d0d1be41fdc818e611ae677121f: Lucien, eh? Can't say that's a name I'm familiar with.
textByHash.f348d067b22026e560e3f22618b2928f1df59a3e: Truth be told, friend, this is basically my retirement. Still, I must admit, years of teaching amateurs how to kill goblins has had me itching to get back to the life of adventure...
textByHash.d2e24538db5264b5b526aed77e9e2bac693c1bfb: Eh, you know what... I'm in! One last job, and quite the job it is!
textByHash.30635646cf481cda355efcd3f39ddc9a130eb054: I will be joining you at the White Knights' Castle very soon. I just have a few things I need to do first.
textByHash.61dd99487540fb8695c64a2c14c5a1cb363f7024: I can honestly say that I'm very excited. It's been so long since I last did anything like this, and Lucien... Well, let's just say that this will be a fitting final adventure for me.
textByHash.1f68564d43028a6123dbae35722096c0aa88abcf: Well, being a Slayer Master was already a form of retirement, but I reckon it might finally be time for me to leave that behind as well.
textByHash.dcda31ab0d3304c8a601618ae1c24da2a0ce1b38: No more needing to swap tasks for anyone! Can you imagine? The hours I've had to spend keeping records up to date! It will be nice not having to worry about that anymore.
textByHash.37d504d1aa213293326335b15740c4b2f3ac2fa6: Well my sister, Aya, is currently filling in for me while I'm here. Maybe she'll be open to doing that longer term. If not, my daughter, Spria, has already become a capable Slayer Master herself.
textByHash.ad2df779e1e2592d80315b1b18338c59975eaca5: Well I was thinking I might take up viticulture. Someone needs to give Bernald some competition.
textByHash.11b579c29a9ebc75b6587f778e287b0ed1455916: I'm one of the elite Slayer Masters.
textByHash.edf682aeb95fd13b577563868e95b1bcd10dfa8b: Oh dear, what do they teach you in school?
textByHash.9051142ab0142911a366341334ce9c2d7d6638f3: I suppose I'll have to educate you then. A slayer is someone who is trained to fight specific creatures. They know these creatures' every weakness and strength. As you can guess it makes killing them a lot easier.
textByHash.232f74b630cd0e38d384be92203eca8e18e51f7b: That's because my foe never lives to tell of me. We slayers are a dangerous bunch.
textByHash.b8a7d2404d22c1b2ed7abaf687c4a0252021b497: Hmmm well I'm not so sure...
textByHash.766d778ed7257f3b6baf485eaf39cf04378028e1: Oh okay then, you twisted my arm. You'll have to train against specific groups of creatures.
textByHash.43a86adcdcec61a9308f39a0549a9ceb02c9ed08: We'll start you off hunting , you'll need to kill of them.
textByHash.fb6d290b5f29a890ccab27708d5ca7336bebef8a: You'll also need this enchanted gem, it allows Slayer Masters like myself to contact you and update you on your progress. Don't worry if you lose it, you can buy another from any Slayer Master.
textByHash.f3aa839fa0cd64749527916f22edb1e796c115ea: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.
textByHash.92d59ac4eef31440349fb8f920c4883b18239b84: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Chaeldar in Zanaris to assign you a task?
textByHash.7b172d997a7cfbf48b6c2eb5c2e7d4f760a1fcc5: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill .
textByHash.f5cd0c62021730cfddb9dd2aa04cc62aa1c75f98: You're still hunting , you have to go.
textByHash.9905cf16a5986ba076d6356f097046301aa604ae: Although, it's not an assignment that I'd normally give... I guess I could give you a new assignment, if you'd like.
textByHash.c9b892402a1a31101c9b83b9f5d094f62e79cf11: If you do get a new one, you will reset your standard task streak of . Is that okay? It won't affect your Wilderness task streak of .
textByHash.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHash.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHash.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHash.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHash.c0dcd9325e7ced3243a9d9d8c6771fbe5de4c8db: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHash.1cd9bdb2d0b412718114a85d06ea7585b9c1aee5: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.0e0b6ccc4a67de673135b9a90e4e5b040b7f149c: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.47f277169b556d3646c41d8aa3ba877ceee4adb1: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.
textByHash.dbd53e5f1c3835c46583db9ab8096068eaee8d1f: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHash.d42fb5d551384e6a73fcef8d1bd57071931f63ca: I suppose you want a new axe?
textByHash.272dd464b657bbd0048672f957fe56141b99acff: You'll need to hand over both a mithril axe and holy symbol of Saradomin. You don't have an axe in your pack, so I'm not able to help.
textByHash.b7f20dbe9a2802775451749f82b6b64bf08908c0: Here's the replacement; be more careful with this one, eh?
textByHash.599f34d335f84542afe094860fbdb4d4e8982e98: Goodbye, then. You may, of course, return if you decide you want a new axe.
textByHash.1c9b044c2b3c733b7d598d53ffb944aabe2d26be: You already have an axe in your bag but you want another?
textByHash.5bcec8e9ed26557d6f5513430380277f99178633: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?
